message:
test(json_parity): add 16 DROPIN-124 tests for tool lifecycle events, extension event mapping, and UI response variants

Comprehensive test coverage for the tool_execution_* event surface and
the extension_event_from_agent mapping function, ensuring Rust Pi matches
the TypeScript Pi event contract documented in DROPIN-124 / bd-359pl.

New tests (numbered 18–33 in the test file):

Extension event mapping (18–20):
- json_parity_extension_event_from_agent_mapping: Exhaustive coverage of all
  15 AgentEvent variants — verifies 10 are forwarded with correct
  ExtensionEventName and 5 are excluded (compaction, retry, extension_error)
- json_parity_extension_event_payload_camel_case: Confirms serialized payloads
  use camelCase (toolCallId, toolName) not snake_case
- json_parity_tool_execution_extension_tool: Extension-prefixed tool names
  (my-extension__custom_tool) serialize and forward correctly

Tool lifecycle detail (21–26):
- json_parity_tool_error_consistency: isError at both top-level and result level
- json_parity_all_builtin_tool_names: All 7 built-in tools serialize correctly
- json_parity_tool_result_no_details: details=None serializes as null
- json_parity_tool_output_content_structure: TextContent array matches pi-mono
- json_parity_tool_args_preserve_arbitrary_json: Complex nested/unicode args
- json_parity_extension_event_round_trip: Direct serialize vs mapping consistency

UI response variants (27–30):
- json_parity_ui_response_value_variant: Select response with string value
- json_parity_ui_response_confirmed_variant: Confirm true/false
- json_parity_ui_response_cancelled_variant: Cancelled with no value
- json_parity_ui_response_text_value: Input and editor text responses

Event name and lifecycle (31–33):
- json_parity_extension_event_name_display: All 12 ExtensionEventName Display
  strings match pi-mono event hook strings
- json_parity_tool_details_rich_data: Bash exitCode/stdout and Read size/lineCount
- json_parity_tool_lifecycle_ordering: start→update→end ordering with shared
  toolCallId and correct extension event mapping

Also adds trailing semicolons to 9 closure expressions for clippy consistency
and imports ExtensionEventName and extension_event_from_agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
